title: Observer Patch Holography Updates
description: Public OPH links, stress-test prompts, source notebook, essays, book, lab, and challenge updates.

items.title: Stress-Test Observer Patch Holography
items.summary: Use the OPH NotebookLM source notebook, public essays, OPH Lab, papers, repository, and public challenge to find the strongest failure mode. Detailed objections should go to tom@floatingpragma.io.

items.title: OPH NotebookLM Source Notebook
items.summary: Ask the source notebook for the strongest objection, the proof chain behind a claim, or the empirical pressure point most likely to break OPH.

items.title: Semiotics and the Physics of Meaning
items.summary: The bridge from signs, interpretation, shared codes, and meaning to observer overlap and stable public records.

items.title: P = NP on the Observer Screen
items.summary: An essay on verification, mismatch detection, local repair, proof-of-work, and stable records as OPH computational primitives. It is not a classical P = NP proof claim.

items.title: The Trigger
items.summary: A public entry point into the OPH claim and its broader stakes.
